'''{{Template:CharInfobox |Box title = Joe Reed |gender = Male |age = ?? |hair colour = Brown (balding) |eye colour = ?? |hometown = Botan City |family = '''Wife:''' [[Evelyn Reed]] (deceased)
'''Son:''' [[Edward Reed]]
'''Daughter:''' [[Carmella Reed]] |class = Leader |badge = White Badge |speciality = Normal-types |leader of = Equality River Gym|image = File:Joe.png}}''' '''Joe Reed''' is a resident of [[Botan City]]. ==Pokémon Brown== In [[Pokémon Brown]], he is the seventh gym leader. He is known to use Super Potions on his Pokémon even when they are at full health. Being a Normal-type trainer, he may be the namesake of the Chansey received in an [[List of in-game trades|in-game trade]] in [[Castro Valley]]. == Pokémon Prism == In [[Pokémon Prism]]. he is still the seventh gym leader and can be found on Route 57. ''''The most normal Trainer you'll ever meet !'''' == Brown == ==Rijon Adventures== In [[Rijon Adventures]], he runs the [[Reed game shack]]. Joe's son Edward is now the [[Equality River]] gym leader.
